ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique patient identifier */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "educational_background" TEXT /* Education level of the patient */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the patient */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the patient */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the patient */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique provider identifier */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., hospital, clinic, physician) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the healthcare provider */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the healthcare provider */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the healthcare provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare provider */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the healthcare provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique service identifier */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare service (e.g., physician visit, hospitalization, medication) */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date the service was provided */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the healthcare provider */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique coverage identifier */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance coverage (e.g., Medicaid, private insurance) */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique claim identifier */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the healthcare service */,
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the insurance coverage */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was submitted */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique outcome identifier */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the healthcare service */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of health outcome (e.g., blood pressure, blood glucose) */,
  "outcome_value" REAL /* Value of the health outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique medication identifier */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "medication_type" TEXT /* Type of medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physician_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique visit identifier */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the healthcare provider */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique hospitalization identifier */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the healthcare provider */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Primary diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nonphysician_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique visit identifier */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the healthcare provider */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id")
)
